text: Opened a new research thread in the openreview systematic-review workspace with the request to review the latest advances in artificial retinas. Claude oriented itself per the repo's entry rules â€” reading OVERVIEW.md and the skills (systematic-review, screening, extraction, evaluation, dashboard) â€” and recognized the workspace already held one completed review (mouse genetics and mesothelioma) with the full protocol-to-PRISMA machinery. It moved to ask a scoping question (via AskUserQuestion) to define the new artificial-retinas review before starting, but the user interrupted that tool call. The session ended at the orientation stage with no protocol, search, or new review directory created.
